app.title: Strategy Canvases
app.subtitle: Real-time strategy canvases for your team

home.title: Projects
home.empty: No projects yet. Create one to start.
home.templatesHint: Pick a template to start a new project, or create one from scratch below.

workspace.selectCanvas: Select a canvas from the sidebar

addCanvas.title: Add a canvas to this project

inspector.tip: Click a sticky or block on the canvas to inspect it.

block.newSticky: + New empty sticky in this block

sticky.author: Author
sticky.shortcuts: Shortcuts: ⌘/Ctrl + C copy · ⌘/Ctrl + V paste · ⌘/Ctrl + X cut · Delete / Backspace remove. Shortcuts act on the sticky object — click into the text box (or double-click the sticky on the canvas) to edit its text.
sticky.shortcutsCompact: ⌘/Ctrl + C / V / X · Delete acts on the sticky object — click the text to edit it.

project.name: Project name
project.deleteHint: Removes the project, all its canvases, and all milestones.

canvasKnowledge.empty: Knowledge for this canvas hasn't been written yet.
canvasKnowledge.emptyHint: Add intro.{{lang}}.md and body.{{lang}}.md under packages/canvases/{{id}}/knowledge/.

config.sectionStrategyHint: Per-canvas Y-axis labels and the X-axis competition factors. Strategy / portfolio canvases only.
config.sectionPinsHint: Each class is one company / theme / persona; same-class pins auto-connect with a line.
config.sectionStickiesHint: Per-canvas meaning for each sticky colour. Empty rows are hidden from the canvas.
config.yAxisHint: Per-canvas labels — overrides the template defaults. Leave a field blank to fall back.

history.title: History
history.empty: No milestones yet — save one from the canvas toolbar.

confirm.deleteCanvasMsg: Delete '{{title}}'? This removes all its milestones too.
confirm.deleteProjectMsg: This will permanently delete the project, all {{count}} canvases inside, and all milestones. To confirm, type the project name:

milestone.title: Save milestone
milestone.prompt: Name the current state of the canvas. You can restore it later.

chart.deleteFactorMsg: Delete '{{name}}'? Pins on the canvas keep their position; the X axis loses this column.

legend.headerHint: Each class is one company / theme / persona. Pins of the same class auto-connect with a line.
legend.activateHint: Make this the class new pins land into
legend.deleteClassMsg: Delete '{{name}}'? All its pins on the canvas will be removed too.

stickyLegend.headerHint: Per-canvas meanings for each sticky colour. Empty rows are hidden from the canvas overlay.
stickyLegend.empty: No sticky legend yet — click '+ Add sticky legend' below to assign meaning to a colour.
stickyLegend.addEntryAllUsed: All six colors are already in use
stickyLegend.addEntryPickHint: Pick a colour to assign meaning
stickyLegend.deleteEntryMsg: Clear the label + description for '{{label}}'? Stickies of this colour are unaffected.

pin.label: Label
pin.labelHint: Shown next to the pin on the canvas
pin.bodyHint: Reference only — not shown on the canvas

identity.title: Welcome
identity.prompt: Pick a display name so your teammates can see who's drawing what. You can change this any time.

business-model-canvas.name: Business Model Canvas
business-model-canvas.tagline: Map an entire business model in nine blocks

value-proposition-canvas.name: Value Proposition Canvas
value-proposition-canvas.tagline: Align customer jobs with what you offer

ad-lib-value-proposition.name: Ad-Lib Value Proposition
ad-lib-value-proposition.tagline: Draft a one-sentence value proposition and iterate

empathy-map.name: Empathy Map
empathy-map.tagline: Step into your customer's head — what they think, see, say, hear, feel

jobs-to-be-done.name: JTBD Story
jobs-to-be-done.tagline: When ___, I want to ___, so I can ___ — plus the emotional + social jobs underneath

business-model-environment.name: Business Model Environment
business-model-environment.tagline: Map the four external forces shaping your business model

customer-journey.name: Customer Journey
customer-journey.tagline: Map a customer's experience over time — find the dips, design the lifts

customer-journey.name: Customer Journey
customer-journey.tagline: Map a customer's experience over time — find the dips, design the lifts

blue-ocean-strategy-canvas.name: Strategy Canvas
blue-ocean-strategy-canvas.tagline: Plot a value curve per company across competitive factors — Blue Ocean Strategy
